mapper.sql: ORG_NO, BRCH_NO, ORG_CD, BRCH_CD, BRCH_NM, BRCH_DISP_NM, SAVE_CAN_YN, USE_CAN_YN, BRCH_STS_CD, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_brch_mst
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_brch_mst (ORG_NO, BRCH_NO, ORG_CD, BRCH_CD, BRCH_NM, BRCH_DISP_NM, SAVE_CAN_YN, USE_CAN_YN, BRCH_STS_CD, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT) values (#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brchNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brchDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brchStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_brch_mst
ORG_NO,
BRCH_NO,
ORG_CD,
BRCH_CD,
BRCH_NM,
BRCH_DISP_NM,
SAVE_CAN_YN,
USE_CAN_YN,
BRCH_STS_CD,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brchNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brchDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brchStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_brch_mst
ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BRCH_NO = #{row.brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_NM = #{row.brchNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_DISP_NM = #{row.brchDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SAVE_CAN_YN = #{row.saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_CAN_YN = #{row.useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_STS_CD = #{row.brchStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_brch_mst set ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BRCH_NO = #{row.brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_NM = #{row.brchNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_DISP_NM = #{row.brchDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SAVE_CAN_YN = #{row.saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_CAN_YN = #{row.useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_STS_CD = #{row.brchStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_brch_mst
ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_CD = #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_NM = #{brchNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_DISP_NM = #{brchDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SAVE_CAN_YN = #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_CAN_YN = #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_STS_CD = #{brchStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and BRCH_NO = #{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_brch_mst set ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_NM = #{brchNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_DISP_NM = #{brchDispNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SAVE_CAN_YN = #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_CAN_YN = #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_STS_CD = #{brchStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and BRCH_NO = #{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}
